name: profile-suggest selects the highest-risk tier when stack, compliance, and government signals are all present
command:
mkdir -p repo/compliance && printf '{"name":"x"}
' > repo/package.json && printf 'framework: nist-csf-2
' > repo/compliance/nist.yaml && printf '# FedRAMP system
A FISMA compliant ledger application.
' > repo/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'suggested_profile=high-risk' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
